Package neqsim.process.processmodel

Class ProcessModelGraphvizExporter

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.processmodel.ProcessModelGraphvizExporter
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ProcessModelGraphvizExporter extends Object implements Serializable
Exports a multi-area ProcessModel to Graphviz DOT diagrams.

The exporter supports two complementary views: one common plant-wide DOT graph with one cluster per ProcessSystem area, and one DOT graph per area for detailed plotting. The common graph infers edges from shared stream object identity across areas, so live inter-area streams become visible as cross-cluster edges.

Version:
1.0
Author:
Even Solbraa
See Also:

    • setTitle

      public ProcessModelGraphvizExporter setTitle(String title)

      title - graph title; ignored when null
      Returns:
      this exporter for fluent configuration

      graph title

      public String toDot()
      Generates a common plant-wide DOT graph with one cluster per process area.

      DOT-format string for the complete process model

    • toAreaDots

      public Map<String,String> toAreaDots()
      Generates one DOT graph per process area.
      Returns:
      map from area name to DOT-format text

    • exportDOT

      public void exportDOT(Path path) throws IOException
      Writes the common plant-wide DOT graph to a file.
      Parameters:
      path - file path to write
      Throws:
      IOException - if the parent directory cannot be created or the file cannot be written

    • exportAreaDOT

      public Map<String,Path> exportAreaDOT(Path outputDirectory) throws IOException
      Writes one DOT file per process area to the supplied directory.
      Parameters:
      outputDirectory - directory where area DOT files are written
      Returns:
      map from area name to written file path
      Throws:
      IOException - if the directory cannot be created or a file cannot be written

    • collectNodesAndStreams

      private void collectNodesAndStreams(Map<String,List<ProcessModelGraphvizExporter.UnitNode>> areaNodes, Map<String,Map<String,ProcessModelGraphvizExporter.UnitNode>> areaNodeByName, Map<StreamInterface,List<ProcessModelGraphvizExporter.UnitNode>> producers, Map<StreamInterface,List<ProcessModelGraphvizExporter.UnitNode>> consumers)
      Collects area nodes and stream endpoints for the common DOT graph.
      Parameters:
      areaNodes - map to populate with nodes grouped by area
      areaNodeByName - map to populate with node lookup by area and unit name
      producers - map to populate with producer nodes by stream identity
      consumers - map to populate with consumer nodes by stream identity

    • collectStreamEndpoints

      private void collectStreamEndpoints(ProcessModelGraphvizExporter.UnitNode node, Map<StreamInterface,List<ProcessModelGraphvizExporter.UnitNode>> producers, Map<StreamInterface,List<ProcessModelGraphvizExporter.UnitNode>> consumers)
      Collects stream producer and consumer endpoints for one unit node.
      Parameters:
      node - unit node to inspect
      producers - stream producer map to populate
      consumers - stream consumer map to populate

      Parameters:
      endpoints - endpoint map to update
      stream - stream identity key
      node - unit node endpoint

    • selectEffectiveSources

      private List<ProcessModelGraphvizExporter.UnitNode> selectEffectiveSources(List<ProcessModelGraphvizExporter.UnitNode> sourceNodes)
      Selects source nodes for a stream, preferring equipment producers over stream-unit producers.
      Parameters:
      sourceNodes - all source nodes registered for a stream
      Returns:
      effective source nodes to use in graph edges

      source - source node
      sink - sink node
      stream - stream carried by the edge
